meta.title: Pricing · Bolt TMS
meta.description: Straightforward TMS pricing: 90-day field test, then month-to-month. Self-serve signup—no enterprise sales tax.

hero.headline: Better than the other guys. Less expensive, too.
hero.subhead: Fully functional TMS for small, mid-sized, and large carriers—the same product whether you run 5 trucks or 500. Start with a 90-day field test on your operation; after that it’s month-to-month with no long-term contract.
hero.contrastLine: Enterprise TMS quotes often bake in months of demos and steak dinners. We’d rather ship software you can afford.

rates.perUnitLabel: Per active truck or driver / month
rates.perUnitDetail: We bill on whichever count is higher—trucks or drivers—so you’re aligned with how your fleet actually runs.
rates.brokerageDescription: Add outside carriers to your network, assign them loads, and keep brokerage workflows inside Bolt.

trialNote: 90-day field test · Month-to-month after · No long-term contract

faq.a: You run Bolt on your real freight and workflows for 90 days—enough time to know if it fits. After that, every plan is month-to-month unless you agree otherwise in writing. No multi-year lock-in by default.
Details are confirmed during onboarding; generally it’s operational capacity you’re using in Bolt in a given billing period. Ask sales if you have an edge case.

faq.q: When do I need the brokerage add-on?
faq.a: When you want to manage third-party carriers and assign loads to them inside the platform. Asset-only fleets can skip it.

disclaimer: Pricing as of May 2026. Final fees are subject to your agreement with Bolt and may change; we’ll always communicate updates clearly.
